paper_title: An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale

extraction_data.innovation: The paper introduces Vision Transformer (ViT), a novel approach to image recognition that leverages the transformer architecture. By directly applying self-attention to sequences of patches extracted from images, ViT achieves impressive performance without relying on traditional convolutional neural networks.
extraction_data.extension: Directly applies self-attention to sequences of patches extracted from images
